description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a sprawling rectangular footprint, surrounded by a fenced yard featuring palm trees, a swing set, a round above-ground pool, and a driveway with parked cars. The main building has a low-pitched, gable-style roof and a prominent front porch with steps leading up to the entrance. Large windows are distributed along the front and sides, providing ample natural light to the interior. The backyard includes an outdoor dining area and a patio, suggesting a focus on outdoor living and recreation. The property is enclosed by a low fence, and the landscaping is minimal but organized, with clear zones for play, relaxation, and vehicle access. The overall design is practical and modern, with clean lines and a functional layout typical of suburban residential neighborhoods.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a gable roof, front porch, fenced yard, and outdoor amenities like a pool and patio. Large windows and a clean, practical layout define its suburban style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, front porch, driveway with cars, and fenced yard with palm trees and outdoor amenities.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bungalow, the driveway, and the arrangement of windows along the side facade.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard patio, outdoor dining area, and the pool, with the roof and back windows visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side yard, swing set, and the overall enclosure of the property with the fence.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
